data.title: Experts Weigh In on Bitcoin's Recovery and Altcoin Weakness
data.description: Bitcoin has maintained its position above $78,000, leading some experts to suggest that the cryptocurrency winter may be over. According to NS3.AI, Michael Saylor expressed optimism about Bitcoin's recovery, indicating that the prolonged downturn might have ended. However, Jason Fernandes noted that despite Bitcoin's improvement, altcoins continue to show signs of weakness. Mati Greenspan added that the recent movements since the October 10 flash crash appear to be a pullback within a larger bull market trend.

data.title: Ethereum's Triangle Pattern Nearing Resolution, Says Trader Merljin
data.description: Ethereum's long-standing triangle pattern is approaching a critical juncture, according to trader Merljin. A breakout above $4,350 could set the stage for a measured target of $10,000. According to NS3.AI, Merljin also noted that a decline below $1,950 would disrupt the structure that has been in place since 2017.

data.title: Samsung Electronics Faces Potential Strike Over Bonus Dispute
data.description: Samsung Electronics' semiconductor production dropped by over 18% in a single day during a general assembly held by its union on April 23, according to the union's "Joint Struggle Headquarters." The union disclosed the production decline data and pressured management, warning that if the company does not agree to allocate 15% of operating profits as performance bonuses, a significant 18-day strike next month could severely impact production. According to Jin10, the union stated on April 24 that due to the previous day's assembly, which involved around 40,000 members, the night shift production at memory chip factories fell by 18.4%. The decline was even more pronounced at wafer foundries, with a 58.1% drop. The union had previously estimated that production losses during the general strike could exceed 30 trillion won. Samsung Electronics' operating profit for this year is expected to be around 300 trillion won. The union's demand would require approximately 45 trillion won in performance bonuses. If management does not meet these demands, the union plans to initiate an 18-day strike from May 21 to June 7. Additionally, the union intends to mobilize "safety protection facility" operators responsible for preventing chemical leaks to maximize the impact on production.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with ABTC up 2.38%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN up 0.31%, MSTR up 1.16%, ABTC up 2.38%, HOOD up 1.24%, SBET up 27%, MARA up 0.17%, and CRCL up 0.95%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Bitcoin Financing Engine Faces Challenges as Strategy STRC Falls Below $100
data.description: Strategy STRC preferred stock has dropped below its $100 face value, according to PANews. This development has impacted the Bitcoin financing engine, causing disruptions in Michael Saylor's plans to purchase more Bitcoin. The market's marginal buying interest is also showing signs of instability.

data.title: Wall Street's Shift Driven by Opportunity Costs
data.description: Wall Street's recent changes are not driven by belief but by the opportunity costs of missing out on potential gains. According to PANews, the financial sector is adapting to new trends and opportunities to avoid losing potential profits. This shift highlights the pragmatic approach of financial institutions in response to evolving market dynamics.

data.title: SpaceX Nears Record IPO, Outpaces Competitors
data.description: SpaceX is approaching a record initial public offering (IPO), further solidifying its lead over competitors. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's advancements under the leadership of Elon Musk. The aerospace manufacturer and space transportation company has been making significant strides in the industry, setting new benchmarks for innovation and growth. As SpaceX continues to expand its operations and capabilities, it remains a dominant force in the space sector, outpacing its rivals in both technological advancements and market presence.

data.title: China Implements New Measures to Regulate Online Financial Marketing
data.description: China's central bank, along with seven other departments, has introduced new measures to regulate online financial marketing, prohibiting the promotion of illegal financial activities such as virtual currency issuance and trading. According to NS3.AI, these measures are set to take effect on September 30, 2026. Under the new regulations, only financial institutions and legally authorized third-party internet platforms are permitted to engage in the online marketing of financial products. Additionally, the rules classify illegal foreign exchange margin trading as an illegal financial activity.

data.title: Israel Identifies Potential Strike Targets in Iran Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: Israel's defense minister has outlined potential targets for strikes within Iran, focusing on energy and infrastructure assets, as reported by Channel 12. According to NS3.AI, these planned large-scale strikes are intended to inflict substantial economic damage should hostilities with Iran resume. The report highlights the escalating tensions between the two nations and Israel's strategic considerations in response to potential threats.

data.title: An account that incurred a loss of approximately $1.5 million purchased $197,000 worth of goods 3 hours ago. (This is related to the Spurs' victory over the Trail Blazers in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA playoffs.)
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0xbd14b65383c15e0b0f64944ca000f9a2bc5dd62a) that lost approximately $1.5 million in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 3: Spurs vs. Trail Blazers" purchased $197,000 worth of bets on the Spurs defeating the Trail Blazers three hours ago, at an average price of 57¢. Game 3 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs between the Spurs and Trail Blazers will tip off at 10:30 AM Beijing time tomorrow. The series is currently tied 1-1. ESPN predicts a 66.4% winning percentage for the Spurs and a 33.6% winning percentage for the Trail Blazers tomorrow. Sports reporter Shams Charania revealed that Viktor Axelsen's concussion condition has improved positively, but his availability for Game 3 remains uncertain. Axelsen was able to perform some level of aerobic exercise late Wednesday, local time, mainly because his symptoms have not worsened. However, Wambano's return still requires compliance with the league's strict concussion protocol. Currently, he hopes to travel with the team to Portland on Friday, but whether he will be eligible to play in Game 3 of the series against the Trail Blazers on Saturday remains highly uncertain. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: ECB's Kazimir: Small Rate Hike May Be Necessary
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Peter Kazimir has indicated that a small interest rate hike might be necessary. According to Jin10, Kazimir's comments suggest a potential adjustment in monetary policy to address current economic conditions. The statement reflects ongoing discussions within the ECB regarding interest rate strategies.

data.title: Israeli Defense Minister says: We are waiting for the US to agree to "completely eliminate the Iranian regime".
data.description: Israeli Defense Minister Katz declared in a video statement on the 23rd that Israel is ready to resume military action against Iran, and that the Israeli military is prepared for both defense and offense, with targets already identified. Katz stated that Israel is awaiting the US's "green light" to "completely eliminate the Iranian regime," and that the Israeli military is ready to launch a "devastating strike" against Iran's "most vulnerable points." Israel's Channel 12 television reported that Katz chaired a special situation assessment meeting at Israeli military headquarters that day, attended by senior Israeli military officers and defense officials. After the meeting, Katz stated that the Israeli military is fully prepared to resume military action against Iran at any time, with operational plans including targeting the "successor" to Iran's supreme leadership, key Iranian energy and power facilities, and economic infrastructure, which would push Iran back to the "Dark Stone Age." (Xinhua)

data.title: The People's Bank of China and eight other departments jointly issued the "Administrative Measures for Online Marketing of Financial Products," which explicitly prohibits the online marketing of illegal financial activities such as the issuance and trading of virtual currencies.
data.description: The People's Bank of China, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, the State Administration for Market Regulation, the Financial Regulatory Commission, the China Securities Regulatory Commission, the State Intellectual Property Office, the Cyberspace Administration of China, and the State Administration of Foreign Exchange jointly issued the "Administrative Measures for Online Marketing of Financial Products," which will take effect on September 30, 2026. The measures clarify that, except for financial institutions and legally entrusted third-party internet platforms, other organizations and individuals are prohibited from conducting online marketing of financial products; no institution or individual may provide online marketing services or facilitate illegal financial activities, and explicitly include virtual currency issuance and trading, illegal foreign exchange margin trading, etc., within the scope of illegal financial activities.

data.title: A whale deposited 2.2 million Trump tokens into Binance and lost $398,000 after holding them for one month.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale held 2.2 million TRUMP tokens (worth $6.29 million), deposited the tokens into Binance, and incurred a loss of $398,000 after holding them for one month.

data.title: India's Digital Rupee Pilots Aim to Enhance Welfare System Efficiency
data.description: India is integrating its welfare system, valued at approximately $80 billion, with around ten e-rupee pilot programs to promote the adoption of the digital rupee. According to NS3.AI, one of these pilots in Gujarat targets reaching 7.5 million households eligible for subsidized food by June. This initiative seeks to provide a more defined use case for the Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) following its gradual introduction.

data.title: Germany's Economic Outlook Dims Amid Iran Conflict, Analyst Says
data.description: On April 24, Commerzbank analyst Jörg Krämer reported that the ongoing conflict in Iran is exerting significant pressure on Germany's economy. According to Jin10, the IFO Business Climate Index fell sharply to 84.4 in April, down from 86.3 the previous month. Elevated energy prices have severely impacted market confidence and economic activity. Commerzbank has revised its forecast for Germany's economic growth in 2026 down to 0.6%, and only 0.3% when adjusted for working days. Krämer noted, "Each day of disruption in oil transport through the Strait of Hormuz increases the risk of economic recession." He added that despite strong fiscal stimulus measures from the German government, the lack of comprehensive reforms, ongoing adverse effects from U.S. tariffs, and the energy shock have largely offset these efforts.

data.title: Four new wallets withdrew 10 million ASTER tokens from Binance, worth $6.7 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, four newly created wallets withdrew 10 million ASTER tokens worth $6.7 million from Binance, which may be related to the same entity.

data.title: Hungary Expected to Cut Interest Rates by 25 Basis Points by End of 2026
data.description: Analysts anticipate that Hungary will reduce its interest rates by 25 basis points by the end of 2026, according to a Reuters survey. This adjustment is expected to bring the rates down to 6.0%.

data.title: Desay SV and Yuanrong Qixing Collaborate on Robotaxi Solutions
data.description: On April 24, during the Beijing Auto Show, Desay SV and Yuanrong Qixing signed a cooperation agreement. According to Jin10, the two companies will collaborate to develop autonomous driving solutions for Robotaxi L4 commercial scenarios. This initiative will utilize the NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion platform's embedded NVLink technology, aiming to transition Robotaxi from technical validation to large-scale deployment.
